title: PlasticForte High Grade Plastic Sink Tidy Cutlery Drainer Holder Caddy 3-4 compartments (Green, 4 compartments wide)
features: ELEGANT DESIGN - This utensil caddy sink caddy is simple to integrate into any kitchen and on any table. Allow yourself a spotless kitchen. A brand-new drainer holder manufactured of Spanish plastic of the highest quality. Two drying compartments for all silverware or utensil requirements are included in a premium daily plastic cutlery drainer.

DIFFERENT COMPARTMENT - This multi-compartment plastic caddy is meant to efficiently store cleaning supplies like sponges, scrubbers, and scourers as well as cleaned cutlery items like spoons, forks, knives, and more. Large enough to separate and hold your spoons, forks, and knives, keep them upright for quick access, and take up the least amount of counter space possible.

ENDLESS USES - This utensil caddy is adaptable and practical and may contain a range of objects. Organize your accessories, beauty goods, creative supplies, and school or office necessities. It serves essentially limitless purposes. Suitable for the majority of kitchen counters and sinks. One of the best kitchen tools for a tidy kitchen and comfortable house. Excellent addition to apartment necessities and kitchen accessories.

QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - The plastic surface is much more appropriate because it will frequently come into contact with water. It will continue to be resistant to joint problems like corrosion. This sink tidy/cutlery drainer will help keep the kitchen sink tidy and adjoining surfaces clean. It is made of high-quality, long-lasting ABS that won't rust, scratch, or chip. Kitchen tools that are damp can quickly dry thanks to the bottom's drain holes.

KEEP DRY - Spatulas, wooden spoons, whisks, soup ladles, tongs, and chopsticks are all organised in this sink caddy. It keeps your countertops spotless, organised, and clean. It will tidy up your countertop and offer an excellent storage solution, making washing and drying dishes convenient and hygienic. Perfect for quickly and safely drying all of your laundry.
